title: carpinus langaoensis
intro: Carpinus langaoensis is a species of deciduous tree in the family Betulaceae, native to China. The bark and leaves of Carpinus langaoensis have been used in traditional Chinese medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Carpinus langaoensis are attributed to its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Carpinus langaoensis include infusions and decoctions made from the leaves, bark, and roots, often combined with other herbs to enhance their medicinal effects.
